creator: hareshx.sankar.raj@intel.com
text:
One of the kyua test in sys/kern/ktls_test attach_test:attach_multiple_fails broken in FBSD 14.1

The test is not present in previous OS version and also no present in the FBSD 15 latest.

Is the attach_multiple_fails obsolete and error expected in FreeBSD 14.1?
Do we know why is this test not included in latest versions?

Steps to reproduce:
1. pkg install kyua
2. sysctl kern.ipc.tls.enable=1
3. cd /usr/tests
4. kyua test sys/kern/ktls_test

Test log:
